docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOST PARKING
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-01-2014
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY CLINE, JOSEPH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-04-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY OSCAR CORDOVA--GARAGE MANAGER AND ARNOLD RAMIREZ--ASSISTANT MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY HOST PARKING ON OCT-04-2012 - DENIED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY CLINE, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT HOST PARKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HOST PARKING
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLINE, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOST PARKING $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,230.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
